name: jorgeiglopez-toolkit
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — domain-specific plugins for day-to-day work

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Skills for clearer, more human writing: tighten prose, strip AI-tells, caveman mode, interview drills.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow actions: stage and commit, open pull requests, mirror CI locally before shipping.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Developer utilities for working in unfamiliar repos. Ships ramp-up: a fast, methodical onboarding pass.

plugins.name: mgt-workflow
plugins.description: Management & reporting workflows. Ships project-cost (estimate Claude Code spend from transcripts) and the toolkit-manager agent (triage toolkit bug reports, stage fixes for review).
